headline: Nucor (NUE) Stock After 124% One-Year Surge Is There Still Value Here
summary: Investors may be wondering if Nucor at around US$260.90 is still offering value, or if most of the opportunity is already reflected in the share price. The stock closed at US$260.90, with the share price down 0.5% over the last week, up 13.5% over the last month, up 54.0% year to date and up 123.6% over the past year. These moves have kept Nucor in focus for investors who are trying to understand what is driving the strong 1-year return and how durable that trend might be. Recent coverage...
